channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BHATIA] Garima Nikhil Bhatia Acquires 1.78% Stake in Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd
item.description:
Garima Nikhil Bhatia, a promoter of Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd, has acquired 1.78% stake in the company. The acquisition was made through 25,00,000 shares carrying voting rights. The total equity shares of the company before the acquisition were 13,01,52,000, which increased to 14,06,52,000 after the acquisition. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition is also 14,06,52,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 1/- each. The acquisition was made on 09/03/2026.

  • Garima Nikhil Bhatia, a promoter of Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd, acquires 1.78% stake in the company
  • The acquisition was made through 25,00,000 shares carrying voting rights
  • The total equity shares of the company before the acquisition were 13,01,52,000, which increased to 14,06,52,000 after the acquisition
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition is also 14,06,52,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 1/- each
  • The acquisition was made on 09/03/2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [AHCL] Neomile Growth Fund Acquires Shares in Anlon Healthcare Ltd Worth 27,45,296 Shares
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Neomile Growth Fund - Series I Takeover) Regulations, 2011. Neomile Growth Fund has acquired shares in Anlon Healthcare Ltd worth 27,45,296 shares. The acquisition took place on the open market. The total equity share capital of Anlon Healthcare Ltd is 5,31,51,500 and the total voting capital is the same. The diluted share/voting capital of Anlon Healthcare Ltd after the acquisition is the same as the total voting capital.

  • Neomile Growth Fund has acquired shares in Anlon Healthcare Ltd worth 27,45,296 shares.
  • The acquisition took place on the open market.
  • The total equity share capital of Anlon Healthcare Ltd is 5,31,51,500 and the total voting capital is the same.
  • The diluted share/voting capital of Anlon Healthcare Ltd after the acquisition is the same as the total voting capital.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anlon Healthcare Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BHATIA] Promoter Group's Hema Sanjeev Bhatia Acquires 1.78% Stake in Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd
item.description:
Hema Sanjeev Bhatia, a Promoter Group member, has acquired a 1.78% stake in Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd through a preferential allotment of shares. The acquisition took place on 9th March 2026, with the allotment of 13,01,52,000 equity shares of Rs. 1/- each. This acquisition increased Hema Sanjeev Bhatia's holding in the company from 0.94% to 1.78%.

  • Hema Sanjeev Bhatia, a Promoter Group member, acquires a 1.78% stake in Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made through a preferential allotment of 13,01,52,000 equity shares of Rs. 1/- each.
  • The acquisition increased Hema Sanjeev Bhatia's holding in the company from 0.94% to 1.78%.
  • The acquisition took place on 9th March 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [AUROPHARMA] Aurobindo Pharma Subsidiary's Unit Classified as VAI by US FDA with 5 Observations
item.description:
Aurobindo Pharma Ltd. has informed about the classification of Unit-IV of its wholly owned subsidiary, APL Healthcare Limited, by the US FDA. The facility was inspected from December 08 to December 17, 2025, and received an Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) classifying it as ‘Voluntary Action Indicated’ (VAI) with 5 observations. This inspection is now considered ‘closed’.

  • Aurobindo Pharma subsidiary's Unit-IV inspected by US FDA from December 08 to December 17, 2025
  • Unit-IV received Form 483 with 05 observations at the end of the inspection
  • Facility classified as ‘Voluntary Action Indicated’ (VAI) by the US FDA
  • Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) issued, marking the inspection as ‘closed’
  • Aurobindo Pharma shares the update pursuant to SEBI Regulations 30

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUROBINDO PHARMA LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [JUPITERIN] Arix Capital Acquires 8.78% Stake in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd Through Share Purchase Agreement
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Arix Capital Ltd has acquired 880,000 shares carrying voting rights in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd, which amounts to 8.78% of the total voting rights. This acquisition was made pursuant to a Share Purchase Agreement dated 9th April 2025. The total equity share capital of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd is Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Re. 10/- each, both before and after the acquisition. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company also remains the same at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Re. 10/- each.

  • Arix Capital Ltd acquires 8.78% stake in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd
  • The acquisition was made pursuant to a Share Purchase Agreement dated 9th April 2025
  • 880,000 shares carrying voting rights were acquired
  • The total equity share capital of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd remains at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Re. 10/- each
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of the company also remains the same at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Re. 10/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUPITER INFOMEDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RUCHINFRA] Promoter Ankesh Shahra Disposes 76 Lakh Shares of Ruchi Infrastructure Ltd to Immediate Relative
item.description:
Ankesh Shahra, a promoter of Ruchi Infrastructure Limited, has disclosed the disposal of 76,00,000 equity shares of the company to his immediate relative, Ms. Amisha Shahra. The transaction, which took place on 10th March, 2026, is an inter-se promoter transfer and qualifies for exemption under Regulation 10 of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeover) Regulations, 2011. However, a disclosure was made due to the gross change in promoter shareholding being more than 2% since the last disclosure. The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remain unchanged at Rs. 23,60,24,942/- each, before and after the transaction.

  • Ankesh Shahra, a promoter of Ruchi Infrastructure Ltd, disposes 76 lakh shares to his immediate relative.
  • The transaction is an inter-se promoter transfer and qualifies for exemption under Regulation 10 of the SEBI regulations.
  • The gross change in promoter shareholding is more than 2% since the last disclosure.
  • The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remain unchanged at Rs. 23,60,24,942/- each.
  • The transaction took place on 10th March, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RUCHI INFRASTRUCTURE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [JUPITERIN] Arix Capital Acquires 5.99% Stake in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd via Share Purchase Agreement
item.description:
🔥 Trending

According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Arix Capital Limited has acquired a 5.99% stake in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd. The acquisition was made pursuant to a Share Purchase Agreement dated 9th April 2025. Before the acquisition, Arix Capital held 8.78% of the shares in Jupiter Infomedia, which has now increased to 14.77% after the acquisition. The total diluted share capital of Jupiter Infomedia remains the same at Rs. 10,02,00,000 divided into 1,00,20,000 equity shares of Re. 10/- each.

  • Arix Capital Limited acquires 5.99% stake in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd
  • The acquisition was made pursuant to a Share Purchase Agreement dated 9th April 2025
  • Before the acquisition, Arix Capital held 8.78% of the shares in Jupiter Infomedia
  • After the acquisition, Arix Capital's holding in Jupiter Infomedia increased to 14.77%
  • The total diluted share capital of Jupiter Infomedia remains the same

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUPITER INFOMEDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SUDTIND-B] Suditi Industries Ltd: Pawan Agarwal & Others Dispose Equity Shares - Revised Disclosure
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Pawan Agarwal & Others. The disclosure pertains to the disposal of equity shares of Suditi Industries Ltd. The revised disclosure includes the details of the disposal and the parties involved.

  • Pawan Agarwal & Others dispose equity shares of Suditi Industries Ltd
  • Disclosure submitted under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • Includes revised details of disposal of equity shares
  • Details of sellers and Persons Acting in Concert (PAC) provided
  • Disposal made on the open market

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUDITI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [SUDTIND-B] Suditi Industries Ltd: Pawan Agarwal & Others Dispose Equity Shares - Regulation 29(2) Disclosure
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Pawan Agarwal & Others regarding the disposal of equity shares of Suditi Industries Ltd. The total equity share capital of the company before the sale was Rs. 43,21,62,910 divided into 4,32,16,291 Equity shares of Rs.10/- each, which has now increased to Rs. 51,91,62,910 divided into 5,19,16,291 Equity shares of Rs.10/- each after the sale.

  • Pawan Agarwal & Others have disposed of equity shares of Suditi Industries Ltd.
  • The total equity share capital of the company has increased from Rs. 43,21,62,910 to Rs. 51,91,62,910 after the sale.
  • The disclosure has been made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUDITI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [EIEL] Enviro Infra Engineers Secures ₹ 411.08 Crores Order for EPC of Aurangabad Sewerage Network and STP Scheme in Bihar
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Enviro Infra Engineers Limited (EIEL) has secured a new project from Bihar Urban Infrastructure Development Corporation Limited for Aurangabad Sewerage Network and STP under AMRUT 2.0. The project includes the EPC of a 20 MLD Sewage Treatment Plant, all appurtenant structures, allied works, disinfection controlled with Scada, 8 Nos. pumping station with 5400 MTR rising main, and sewerage network of 196 Km. The project also includes O&M for 5 years. The value of the order is ₹ 411.08 Crores (including GST). This project marks EIEL's foray into the state of Bihar, increasing its geographical presence.

  • Enviro Infra Engineers Limited (EIEL) secures a new project from Bihar Urban Infrastructure Development Corporation Limited for Aurangabad Sewerage Network and STP under AMRUT 2.0
  • The project includes the EPC of a 20 MLD Sewage Treatment Plant, all appurtenant structures, allied works, disinfection controlled with Scada, 8 Nos. pumping station with 5400 MTR rising main, and sewerage network of 196 Km
  • The project also includes O&M for 5 years
  • The value of the order is ₹ 411.08 Crores (including GST)
  • This project marks EIEL's foray into the state of Bihar, increasing its geographical presence

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd | Category: New Launch
